title: Refund vs Demand Calculation — Final Tax Position
description: Computes the taxpayer's final tax position by netting total tax liability (including interest under 234A/B/C) against all advance taxes paid and TDS credits. Produces either a refund claim amount or a self-assessment tax demand. TDS credits are only taken from 26AS (R-0009 / R-0011 rules confirm 26AS is the authoritative source for TDS credit). This rule produces the single number that drives the most important taxpayer question: 'Will I get money back or do I owe?'

logic.if: total_tax_liability is computed (total_tax_new_regime or total_tax_old_regime per regime_recommendation from R-0018) AND tds_credits are verified (from 26AS via R-0009/R-0011)
logic.then: 1. total_tax_due = total_tax_chosen_regime + total_interest (from R-0022). 2. total_taxes_paid = sum(advance_tax_paid) + sum(tds_credits_from_26AS) + sum(self_assessment_tax_paid). Note: only TDS appearing in 26AS is creditable (R-0009 rule: Prefill TDS not in 26AS = unclaimed_credit_risk). 3. net_position = total_taxes_paid - total_tax_due. 4. If net_position > 0: outcome = refund; refund_amount = net_position; file_for_refund = true. 5. If net_position < 0: outcome = demand; demand_amount = abs(net_position); pay_before_filing = true; note: self-assessment tax must be paid before the return can be filed (Section 140A). 6. If net_position == 0: outcome = nil_balance; no_payment_required = true. 7. Output: { outcome, refund_amount (if refund), demand_amount (if demand), total_tax_due, total_taxes_paid, tds_credit_breakdown, computation_trace }
logic.else: if total_tax_liability is unavailable: block on R-0020/R-0021 outputs. If tds_credits are unverified (26AS not loaded): cannot compute final position — return position_pending reason=26AS_required.

authority.section: Section 140A (self-assessment tax), Section 199 (TDS credit), Section 237 (refund), Section 244A (interest on refund)
authority.circular: CBDT Circular 2/2021 (TDS credit: only 26AS entries claimable)

notes: This rule is the terminal step of Wave 3A. Its output is the primary deliverable of the Tax Computation Engine. Key constraint: TDS credit is restricted to amounts appearing in 26AS — Prefill-only TDS entries are explicitly excluded (R-0009 enforcement). If 26AS is unavailable, this rule cannot complete — the taxpayer must not be advised on refund/demand without confirmed TDS credits. If refund_amount > 0 and return is filed after the due date, the department may not pay interest on the refund under Section 244A if the refund is less than 10% of total tax determined — this edge case is flagged but not computed here.
